project.name: Minitia.fun
project.tagline: Instant Appchain Launcher — launch anything, graduate fast.
project.summary: Fair-launch appchain launcher on Initia. Mint a token in seconds, trade on a 100ms-block bonding curve, graduate liquidity to InitiaDEX, and promote the community into its own sovereign L2 rollup — all from one cockpit.
project.pointOfView: Pump.fun proved the market for instant-launch token economies but graduation ends at a DEX. On Initia, graduation is just the beginning — successful communities fork into their own sovereign L2 with custom execution and fee economics. Launch-to-sovereignty in a single product.

modules.name: token_factory
modules.description: Mints a new Move object-metadata token with canonical identity (ticker.fun.init).

modules.name: bonding_curve
modules.description: On-chain supply-based pricing with 0.5% trading fee retained to the appchain.

modules.name: liquidity_migrator
modules.description: Automates migration to InitiaDEX on L1 via OPinit Bots when graduation threshold is reached.

proof.txSubmissionNote: Deploy Token button uses useInterwovenKit().requestTxBlock to submit a real MsgSend tx on initiation-2 as proof-of-pipeline; tx hash is displayed in-app and links to scan.testnet.initia.xyz.

autoSign.uxEffect: Buy/Sell on Trade page executes without wallet popups after first session-key grant.

interwovenBridge.uxEffect: Users deposit from Ethereum, Solana, or any supported chain in one step.

economicFlywheel.launchFee: Small INIT fee per token → protocol revenue
economicFlywheel.enshrinedLiquidity: Graduated tokens become L1 staking-eligible for network-security rewards.
economicFlywheel.vipRewards: Eligible for esINIT distribution every 2 weeks; redistributed to active traders as loyalty incentive.

targetUsers: Memecoin community founders seeking L2 graduation upside
DeFi protocol founders who want a Move L2 without infra cost

competitors.name: Pump.fun
competitors.ourEdge: Graduation continues into a sovereign L2 rollup — they stop at Raydium.

competitors.name: Virtuals
competitors.ourEdge: Category-agnostic (any token, not only AI agents).

competitors.name: Believe
competitors.ourEdge: Move VM asset safety + Interwoven Bridge onboarding across all chains.

competitors.name: Base memecoin apps
competitors.ourEdge: 100ms blocks vs 2s, native cross-chain deposit, no bridge friction.

distributionLevers: X algorithmic reach via fair-launch transaction firehose
Telegram alpha channels for new-token notifications
Cross-chain deposits open onboarding from any ecosystem
Graduated-token success stories as case studies

milestones.phase1Testnet: Full UI + InterwovenKit + AutoSign + Bridge + Usernames + real MsgSend tx on initiation-2 (this submission).
milestones.phase2DemoDay: Move modules deployed on minitia-fun-test-1 rollup; end-to-end token_factory mint + bonding_curve buy via session keys.
milestones.phase3Mainnet: Sovereign Minitia spawn for graduated communities, OPinit liquidity migration, VIP esINIT redistribution.

techStack.styling: Tailwind CSS 3 with custom Sovereign Velocity design tokens
techStack.typography: Instrument Serif (display) + Bricolage Grotesque (UI) + JetBrains Mono (data)

complianceChecklist.demoVideo: See .initia/demo.md for production-ready script; video file to be attached with final submission.
complianceChecklist.onChainProof: Real tx submitted on initiation-2 via requestTxBlock on Launchpad Deploy action.
